2384020.name: Bioysque
2384020.description:
OVERVIEW:

Bioysque is a retro-style Action RPG in a dark bio-horror environment, both sci-fi and fantasy motives. You are always alone and they are always many. Fight surreal creatures, get experience, explore and gather upgrades - get stronger before the next big Boss fight, learn the truth. Win and be rewarded.

DEVELOPER'S MESSAGE:

I never intended to make this game. But I saw it in a dream, so I had to make it! For some strange reason, that's pretty rare for me. I have seen about 3 dreams in my whole life (or more likely, those are all I remember). I had to try at least. (time skip here) And here it is. I actually made the game I saw in a dream. What could be more surreal than that?

3 MOST IMPORTANT FEATURES:

  • Rare - forgotten/unknown - Biopunk Sci-Fi/Fantasy setting; short but multi-layered story

  • Unique <direct click> battle system: no time wasted! Hit whatever you see wherever it is!

  • Mostly Wall-less level design and portal-based world. *more about it in the section below...

WARNING I:

Exploration done differently, and I think it's preferable to know, before you try the game.

  • | Most rooms/locations are connected via portals.

  • | You always start in the center of the area (room/location).

  • | Locations have no real boundaries - they are infinite. (That means: the real content is always close to the center. There is nothing to find on the edges!)

  • | The only right way to navigate is finding and following "the guides". Some are actual signposts, some are text hints, some are the paths that creatures follow, etc. Surprisingly, that kind of navigation is much closer to real life, than anything.

WARNING II:

NO GAMEPAD SUPPORT! You have to click rather quickly and with a high precision too. Keyboard and mouse is the only comfortable (and well tested) way to play it.

WARNING III:

For more info about the game - read the manual. You can find it right on this page in the column below the banner >>>
